unresolved: The exact nature of the change is ambiguous: 'a field is added to the query request path' could mean (a) a new field added to backend.QueryDataRequest struct — in which case pass-through middleware implementations need no body changes, only call sites constructing the struct must set the field; or (b) a new parameter added to the QueryData function signature itself — in which case every implementation and every call site must change syntactically. The list above covers both interpretations.

backend.QueryDataRequest is defined in the external dependency github.com/grafana/grafana-plugin-sdk-go (v0.291.0). If the change originates in the SDK, a dependency bump is a prerequisite, and the SDK's own ToProto/FromProto conversion functions (external) would also need updating — those are not in this repo.

pkg/tsdb/influxdb/influxql/influxql.go:Query takes *backend.QueryDataRequest as a parameter and is called by both Service.QueryData and healthcheck.go — it may need to thread a new path field through if the field has semantic meaning, but it does not implement the QueryDataHandler interface so its inclusion depends on whether path is used in influxql query routing.

pkg/tsdb/zipkin/handler_querydata.go:queryData and pkg/tsdb/jaeger/querydata.go:queryData are internal package-level helpers called from Service.QueryData with the same *backend.QueryDataRequest — they would only need changes if the new field affects their behavior.

Dynamic dispatch via instancemgmt (cloudwatch/service.go, pyroscope/service.go, parca/service.go) may route to additional DataSource instance implementations not statically visible; runtime-instantiated plugin instances loaded over gRPC are external and not in this repo.

pkg/plugins/backendplugin/grpcplugin/client_proto.go:QueryData uses *pluginv2.QueryDataRequest (gRPC proto type), not *backend.QueryDataRequest; whether it needs updating depends on whether the SDK's ToProto/FromProto conversion propagates the new field automatically or requires explicit handling in client_v2.go:QueryData

pkg/tsdb/prometheus/prometheus.go:QueryData delegates to github.com/grafana/grafana-prometheus-datasource/pkg/promlib.Service.QueryData (external module, not in this repo); the external promlib implementation would also need updating but is out of scope

The exact nature of 'field added to query request path' is ambiguous: if it means a URL path variable added to the K8s Connect endpoints (sub_query.go, query.go, queryconvert.go) then only the Connect/NewConnectOptions handlers need path-extraction changes, and the backend.QueryDataRequest constructors need the new field — but if it means a Go function signature change (new parameter), then all 80+ implementations above must change signatures

datasource.QueryTypeMux (from SDK, used in pkg/tsdb/grafana-testdata-datasource/testdata.go and pkg/tsdb/azuremonitor/azuremonitor.go) also implements backend.QueryDataHandler — if its SDK-side signature changes, Grafana's usage is indirect via queryMux.QueryData call sites; any registered HandleFunc callbacks (the scenario handlers) would also need updating

pkg/registry/apis/query/query.go:queryREST.NewConnectOptions and queryREST.Connect may need to change if a URL path variable is being added (similar to sub_query.go:Connect), but these are not implementations of backend.QueryDataHandler itself
